hero.title: Your logistics partner between
hero.description: Transit, customs clearance and import/export between DRC, Cameroon and China. Speed, reliability and transparency.

services.sectionDesc: Complete logistics solutions for your import/export needs
services.customsDesc: Fast and compliant customs procedures for your goods in DRC and Cameroon.
services.transitDesc: Secure multimodal transport between China, Cameroon and DRC.
services.importDesc: Complete management of your international trade operations.
services.trackingDesc: Track your shipments step by step with our digital platform.
services.sourcingDesc: Supplier search and negotiation in China for your products.
services.logisticsDesc: End-to-end solutions: packaging, warehousing and delivery.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple 4-step process
howItWorks.step1Desc: Fill out our online form with your shipment details.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our team analyzes your request and sends you a personalized offer.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We handle the shipping and you track it in real time.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Receive your goods with customs clearance included.

cta.title: Ready to ship?
cta.description: Get your free quote in less than 24 hours. Our team of experts is at your service.
